# Appendix A: Command and Function Catalog

Grouped by functional area. Status comes from the Free85 2.0 command ledger: `equivalent` items work today; other statuses are tracked gaps.

| Item |
| --- |
| `abs` |
| `+` |
| `-` |
| `*` |
| `/` |
| `^` |
| `x^2` |
| `sqrt` |
| `10^x` |
| `e^x` |
